assertions.title: Header shows title, separator, search input

steps.expected: Header has home icon, title, separator, search label
steps.observed: Line 1: 🏠 Lab Directory Selection + path. Line 2: 80 ─ chars. Line 3: Search: with cursor

steps.action: Run --and-exit, check last 2 lines of stderr
steps.observed: Second-to-last: ─ separator. Last: ↑/↓: Navigate  Enter: Select  ^R: Rename  ^G: Graduate  ^D: Delete  Esc: Cancel

steps.action: Run --and-exit with LAB_HEIGHT=24, count entry lines
steps.observed: 19 body rows (3 header + 19 body + 2 footer = 24). With LAB_HEIGHT=8: 3 body rows (minimum)

steps.action: Run --and-exit with LAB_WIDTH=80, count ─ chars per separator line
steps.observed: Each separator line has exactly 80 ─ characters
Each separator line has exactly 40 ─ characters

steps.action: Run --and-exit, check for → on first entry
steps.observed: First entry has → prefix with bg highlight. Other entries have plain prefix

assertions.title: Entry shows icon, name, right-aligned metadata

steps.expected: Selection indicator + icon + name + right-aligned timestamp,score
steps.observed: Each entry: → or space + 📁 + name + right-aligned dim 'just now, 5.0'
All entries show 'just now' (touched within seconds)

assertions.title: Selected entry has arrow and background

steps.action: Run --and-exit, check ANSI codes on first entry
steps.expected: → prefix with background color ANSI codes
steps.observed: First entry: bold yellow → with bg color 238. Non-selected entries have no bg highlight

steps.action: Create regular-file.txt in test dir, run --and-exit

assertions.title: Date prefix dim styling on entries

steps.action: Run --and-exit with date-prefixed entries, check ANSI codes
steps.expected: Date portion (YYYY-MM-DD-) has dim ANSI code (38;5;245)
steps.observed: Date prefix rendered with dim color code 38;5;245. Name portion uses normal style
Header contains 'Lab Directory Selection'. grep returns 1 match

summary: Tested 13 assertions: all 13 passed. TUI layout renders correctly with header (title, separator, search), body (entries with icons, metadata, selection), and footer (keybindings). Hidden dirs excluded, files excluded, date prefixes dim, lab branding correct.
